subcodes.first_line: O ye true friends! The letters ye wrote, the pages ye penned, and the names ye mentioned were all received in the Holy Land
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی الواح مسطوره و اوراق منشوره و اسماء مذکوره کل ببقعه مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @stories; anecdotes, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun, @call to action
